title: create a image of a dog on the donkey

messages.text: create a image of a dog on the donkey
It seems like you're interested in creating images! You can say "create an image of a dog on a donkey" to generate one. Would you like to try that?
create an image of a dog on a donkey
It looks like you're ready for more! Just say "create an image of..." followed by what you'd like to see. What would you like to create this time?
